title: bolbitis angustipinna
intro: Bolbitis angustipinna is a type of aquatic fern native to Southeast Asia, known for its distinctive narrow pinnae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Bolbitis angustipinna include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
